info.name: GitLens — GitHub Profile Analyzer API
info.description: Complete API collection for the GitHub Profile Analyzer backend service.

request.description: Check if the API server is running and healthy.
Fetches a GitHub user's profile, computes insights (stars, forks, languages, top repos, etc.), and stores/updates the result in MySQL. If the profile already exists it is updated (upsert).

query.description: Sort field: analyzed_at | followers | total_stars | public_repos | username

request.description: Returns all analyzed profiles stored in the database with pagination.
Returns the full analysis data (including top repos and language breakdown JSON) for a single stored profile.
Permanently removes a profile from the database.

query.description: Metric to rank by: total_stars | followers | public_repos | total_forks | account_age_days
Number of top profiles to return

request.description: Returns the top N profiles ranked by a chosen metric.
